---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Component**
Which part would this affect? (agent, gateway, workers, dashboard, providers)

**Problem**
What problem does this solve? What is the current limitation?

**Proposed solution**
How would you like this to work?

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you have thought about.

**Additional context**
Any other information or screenshots.
